title: plumeria leucantha
intro: Plumeria leucantha, also known as the Red Plumeria or Mexican Plumeria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its fragrant, funnel-shaped flowers and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Plumeria leucantha include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve mood, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and other sleep disorders. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
